rule.zh: 不生成新的实机分数；PPT中的历史主观评价只转译为状态标签，并保留验证要求。
rule.en: No new field-test score is created. Historical subjective ratings are translated only into status labels with validation requirements.

conclusion.zh: 起吊超限报警、回转制动、ROPS/OPG、行走报警、信标灯和安全标识在资料中被评为与竞品总体相当。
conclusion.en: Overload warning, swing brake, ROPS/OPG, travel alarm, beacon and safety labels are assessed as broadly comparable in the source.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 紧固件防锈、薄板件涂层耐久和橡胶件耐久被列为弱于久保田。
conclusion.en: Fastener corrosion protection, sheet-metal coating durability and rubber-component durability are listed below Kubota.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: PPT将常规温湿度适应性评为相当，但高原数据未给出，不能据此确认高海拔能力。
conclusion.en: The PPT rates normal temperature/humidity capability as comparable, but provides no altitude value, so high-altitude capability cannot be confirmed.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 资料称脚阀与主阀阀芯优化后，启动、制动、跑偏和转向操控与竞品接近；当前标定版本需复核。
conclusion.en: The source states that pedal-valve and main-spool tuning brought start, braking, tracking and steering control close to the benchmarks; the current calibration version requires verification.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 微动性、作业精准性和平顺性低于竞品，回转制动线性不足会引起工作装置回摆。
conclusion.en: Inching, task precision and smoothness trail the benchmarks, and insufficient swing-braking linearity is reported to cause implement rebound.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: PPT评价平地动作协调性优于久保田，但未附当前盲测、循环时间或平整精度数据。
conclusion.en: The PPT rates grading coordination above Kubota, but includes no current blind evaluation, cycle-time or grade-accuracy dataset.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 座椅减震、空调、脚踏距离、扶手箱内宽、屏幕尺寸、侧门解锁和手机支架被列为人机差距。
conclusion.en: Seat suspension, HVAC, pedal reach, console width, display size, door release and phone-holder provision are listed as ergonomic gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 可翻转驾驶室和开启式舱门具备维修基础，但整体可达性及缺少独立液压油加注口被列为差距。
conclusion.en: The tilting cab and opening panels provide a service foundation, but overall access and the absence of a dedicated hydraulic-oil fill point are listed as gaps.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 资料将燃油经济性列为优于久保田，但未附统一工况下的当前油耗数据。
conclusion.en: The source lists fuel economy above Kubota, but provides no current fuel-use dataset under a common duty cycle.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 外观涂装长期防锈和管线识别性弱于久保田，可能影响维护效率和二手机残值。
conclusion.en: Long-term coating/corrosion performance and line identification trail Kubota, with potential impact on service efficiency and residual value.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide

conclusion.zh: 资料种类基本齐全，但售后手册齐全性、易读性和内容准确性仍需提升。
conclusion.en: Document coverage is broadly complete, while after-sales manual completeness, readability and content accuracy still need improvement.

records.as_of_date: PPT 11.14 version; year not stated on slide
